Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sword Icon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 20''' — The Sword Icon is a technique or manifestation that can be touched upon in an attack.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Sword Icon is a manifestation held by certain Sages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Sword Icon has guided Yerin in battle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Sword Icon is a specific type of Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Sword Icon is an entity that Yerin seeks to get closer to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin is working on her connection to the Sword Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin can feel the Sword Icon when she pushes herself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 17''' — The Winter Sage told Yerin to let the Icon show through her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Icon is something a practitioner can develop a connection to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — The Sword Icon is something a person might manifest before reaching Archlord.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin can sense the Sword Icon when her Shadow's influence is weakened.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — An Icon is a symbol of a powerful concept.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 22''' — Manifesting the Sword Icon is a way to win handily.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 25''' — The feeling of the Sword Icon settled around Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Sword Icon can provide advice to its user.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Spirits cannot touch Icons; only living humans can.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Sword Icon told Yerin to run power through her sword and pull it free.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — The Sword Icon is something Archlords spend lifetimes pursuing.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin could no longer sense the Sword Icon.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — The Sword Icon is something Heralds are deaf to but can resonate with.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 8''' — A Sage can read an Icon like a book.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Sword Icon is a power or phenomenon that Yerin has experienced.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — Yerin wrestled the Sword Icon down and it vanished.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
